findingDetails.title: Apply is not required to revalidate the reviewed dry-run snapshot
findingDetails.evidence: The plan records candidate/worktree and map identities, but no requirement or checklist binds apply to those identities before writes.

findingDetails.title: The declared leading-hyphen CLI hazard has no rejecting engine or harness criterion
findingDetails.evidence: Policy names leading-hyphen CLI hazards, while engine/harness acceptance covers leading underscores and collision classes but not leading-hyphen operands.
findingDetails.recommendation: Define reject-or-safe-argv behavior and add source/target negative fixtures.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Policy-to-engine-to-harness search for leading-hyphen, argv, option termination, unsafe-target, and fixture requirements.

results.summary: Security decisions are not fully expressed as executable engine requirements.
